expectations.text: Verdict is a clear, unqualified PASS
expectations.evidence: "PASS — all four steps ran, in the designed order, with success signals and output values matching the plan; no errors found."

expectations.text: All 4 steps individually marked as ran & succeeded, each with quoted log-line evidence
expectations.evidence: Step-by-Step Results table: all 4 rows marked '✅ ran & succeeded' with quoted log lines.

expectations.text: item_count (2) and quantity_decremented (2) explicitly compared and confirmed to match
expectations.evidence: Output Value Checks table row 3: 'quantity_decremented=2 vs item_count=2 | ✅ matches'

expectations.text: Report explicitly states no errors/exceptions were found
expectations.evidence: 'None found. Scanned for ERROR, FATAL, Exception, Traceback, panic, and non-2xx-style status codes — no hits...'

expectations.text: Output is saved as a structured report file
expectations.evidence: report.md written matching the skill's full template (Verdict, Step-by-Step, Logging Quality, Errors, Output Values, Fixes, Assumptions).
